name: last30days-skill
description: Research a topic from the last 30 days across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, and the web.

settings.name: Extension Directory
settings.description: Extension installation directory (auto-set by Gemini CLI)

settings.name: ScrapeCreators API Key
settings.description: ScrapeCreators API Key for Reddit, TikTok, and Instagram search (required)

settings.name: OpenAI API Key
settings.description: OpenAI API Key - optional fallback for Reddit discovery

settings.name: xAI API Key
settings.description: xAI API Key for X/Twitter search (optional)

settings.name: Twitter AUTH_TOKEN
settings.description: Twitter browser AUTH_TOKEN cookie for direct X search (optional)

settings.name: Twitter CT0
settings.description: Twitter browser CT0 cookie (optional, pair with AUTH_TOKEN)
